## Page

<!-- URL or relative path. e.g. docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md#install-failures -->

## Problem

<!-- What's wrong? Pick one or describe in your own words:

- The page is missing information I needed.
- The page has information that is wrong or out of date.
- The page is unclear or ambiguous.
- The page has a typo, broken link, or formatting issue.
- I expected a page to exist and it doesn't. -->

## What did you expect?

<!-- Concrete description of what the page should say or include. -->

## What did you find instead?

<!-- The current content, quoted if short. -->

## Suggested fix

<!-- Optional: a proposed replacement paragraph or a link to a
doc that handles this well elsewhere. -->

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I am willing to open a PR with this change.
- [ ] I can help review, but not implement.
- [ ] Just flagging it.
